name: Sweet Potato & Ham Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 250°F.
2. Wash but do not peel the sweet potato. Shred the potato on a fine blade of a shredder or food processor and place it in a mixing bowl.
3. Finely chop the ham and pulse using the puree blade of a food processor. Add the chopped ham to the shredded potato.
4. Add salt and pepper, then mix well.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add one-quarter of the potato-ham mixture.
6. Cook about 4 minutes, pressing down gently to compact the hash as it cooks.
7. Flip the hash patty and cook another 5 minutes. If necessary, add more butter.
8. Repeat with the remaining mixture, adding more butter to the skillet as needed.
9. As each hash patty is done, transfer it to the oven to keep warm.
10. Place 2 poached eggs on each serving.
11. Garnish with a dollop of sour cream.
